name: GNSSAddWpRel
title: GNSSAddWpRel
syntax: dword GNSSAddWpRel( double latLength, double lonLength, double altLength )
description: This function inserts a new waypoint at the end of the waypoint list. The new point is derived by adding the path differences and the last waypoint to be inserted.
The unit of the parameters depends on the system of measurement units selected with the GNSSSetUnits function.

parameters.name: latLength
parameters.description: difference in length along the latitude in reference to the last waypoint to be inserted (in m or yd)
